user_story: As a System admin, I want to enable or disable Tax Planning, so that the tax planning module is available only when the organization needs it
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Setup screen; When I select Yes or No for "Do you want to enable Tax Planning?" and click Save; Then the Tax Planning setting is applied

user_story: As a System admin, I want to save my setup choice and proceed to the next configuration step, so that I can continue configuring tax planning in sequence
acceptance_criteria: Given I have chosen a Tax Planning option; When I click Save & Next; Then my choice is saved and I advance to the next configuration screen

user_story: As a System admin, I want to cancel the setup without saving, so that I can exit without changing the current configuration
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Setup screen; When I click Cancel; Then no changes are saved and I leave the screen
